policy: Ordinary Go features are frontend work unless explicitly excluded. Generics, goroutines, channels, select, and cgo are currently excluded; diagnostics for other features identify implementation backlog, not language exclusions.

cases.title: Raw string literals
cases.commentary_html: This checked fixture currently compiles end to end in both recorded compiler stages. Broader forms may have different coverage.

cases.commentary_html: This checked fixture currently reaches the backend but does not produce an object. It records a remaining frontend/backend contract gap.

cases.title: Array parameters and results
cases.commentary_html: Fixed arrays use value-copy parameter and hidden-result semantics. This probe and the backend regression suite cover literals, zero values, locals, forwarded calls, and direct indexing of returned arrays.
